name: Dominimon

signature_move.name: Final Excalibur
signature_move.description: Pierces the enemy with a blade of energy that manifests on its arm.

description: A Dominion Digimon also known as a phantom. It acts on its own accord without being bound by the angelic chain of command. If a powerful enemy emerges, it will join forces with Clavis Angemon and Slash Angemon to defeat it. It is a rare species that suddenly manifests akin to a mutation when the balance between light and darkness in the Digital World is disrupted, and so very few have ever seen it. With a personality that values its entire race over any individual, it doesn't treat its own life as being that important, and will launch a death-defying special attack to get out of a predicament without hesitation. Its Special Moves are piercing the enemy with a blade of energy that manifests on its arm ( Final Excalibur ), firing ultra-high-temperature lasers from the shields on its shoulders in every direction ( Zero Heavens ), and emanating a holy aura from its whole body, granting power to Angel-species Digimon in its surroundings at the cost of shortening its own life ( Devotion Field ).
